Logic Analysis: Contains Flight, Slot, Runway classes with data structures and interfaces
Contains Scheduler class with core scheduling logic, imports from models
Contains Flask App class with route handlers, imports from scheduler
Frontend HTML template for timetable display
Full API spec:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Flight Scheduler API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /register_flight:
    post:
      summary: Register a new flight
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                flight_id:
                  type: string
                flight_type:
                  type: string
                  enum: [arrival, departure]
                estimated_time:
                  type: string
                  format: date-time
                is_emergency:
                  type: boolean
                  default: false
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Flight registered successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                  slot:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      runway:
                        type: integer
                      start_time:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
                      end_time:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
  /close_runway:
    post:
      summary: Close a runway
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                runway_id:
                  type: integer
                  enum: [1, 2]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Runway closed, flights reassigned
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                  delayed_flights:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        flight_id:
                          type: string
                        new_slot:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            runway:
                              type: integer
                            start_time:
                              type: string
                              format: date-time
                            end_time:
                              type: string
                              format: date-time
  /declare_emergency:
    post:
      summary: Declare an emergency for a flight
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                flight_id:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Emergency handled
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                  emergency_slot:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      runway:
                        type: integer
                      start_time:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
                      end_time:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
  /timetable:
    get:
      summary: Get timetable for a runway
      parameters:
        - name: runway_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
            enum: [1, 2]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: HTML page with timetable
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
Shared Knowledge: The `models.py` file defines the core data structures (Flight, Slot, Runway) that are shared across `scheduler.py` and `app.py`. The `scheduler.py` module contains the main scheduling logic and is imported by `app.py` for route handling. The `templates/index.html` uses a grid-based HTML table with color coding for timetable display, styled by `static/style.css` and enhanced by `static/script.js` for dynamic interactions.
Anything UNCLEAR: The timetable display format is clarified as an HTML table with color coding. The system currently supports exactly two runways, but the design can be extended to more runways in the future. No additional clarification needed.
